title: WASI P3 Roadmap, wasmCloud Secrets Plugin & NATS Messaging Interface
meta_description: wasmCloud community call covering the Q2 roadmap with full WASI P3 support, the new wasmCloud secrets plugin with typed declarative resources, HTTP routing via External ID, and a proposed NATS-specific WIT interface.
tldr: The April 15, 2026 wasmCloud community call centered on the finalized Q2 roadmap, with full WASI P3 support as the headline goal for the quarter. The team walked through HTTP routing changes using the component model's External ID spec, introduced a new wasmCloud secrets plugin with typed declarative resource management, and discussed a proposed NATS-specific WIT interface for durable messaging beyond the generic event bus.
takeaways: Full WASI P3 support targeted by end of Q2 — wasmCloud already has P3 behind a feature flag with working async HTTP examples
Component interposition showcases P3 composition — Elizabeth Gilbert's project demonstrates ordered middleware composition using WASI HTTP
HTTP routing prefers spec-level External ID over host magic — three-week target before fallback to host-side routing
wasmCloud secrets plugin adds typed, declarative secret management with a get/reveal pattern
wasm-to-env extracts required environment variables from Wasm binaries using static analysis
New TypeScript docs cover file systems and configuration for component authoring
NATS-specific WIT interface proposed for durable messaging with JetStream support
Multiple host modes (wash dev, wash host, wash lit) support edge and IoT deployments
